case_title: JAMES LOUIE VS. ROGER LWIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOUIE, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LWIN, ROGER DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 934 LARKIN STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94109, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 74064357)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LWIN, ROGER
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (TRANSACTION ID # 73460394) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, JAMES

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73873873), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, JAMES SERVED JUL-10-2024, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 74032852) AS TO DEFENDANT LWIN, ROGER DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE
